name: Corn Chowder (Prodigy)
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Onions, peeled and roughly diced
4 cups Corn kernels, cooked or raw
recipeInstructions:
This soup is a favorite at Trumps restaurant in Los Angeles.
1. Combine onions and butter in a 2-quart pot over medium heat on the stove. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the onions are soft, about 10 minutes.
2. Add the corn and continue to cook, stirring occasionally, another 8-to-10 minutes.
3. Add the broth, salt, mace, and pepper. Cover, increase heat to high, and cook for 20 minutes.
4. Place soup in a food processor and puree until smooth.
5. Replace the soup in a pot on the stove over medium heat and add rosemary leaves, milk, and cream. Cover and bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat to low and cook for 5 minutes. Serve piping hot.
